description: Existing patient moves an appointment to a different day.
judge_questions: Did the agent look up the appointment by phone before rescheduling?
Did the agent read back the new slot before confirming?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Fortis Memorial Research Institute, Gurgaon. This is Diya. How may I help you today?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Hi, yes, hello. My son booked an appointment for me there, but something has come up and I won't be able to make it. I'm afraid I've completely forgotten the date and time, could you look it up for me? My number is 9811111006.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I've found your appointment, Mr. Krishnan. You are scheduled to see Dr. Anil Mandhani for a new consultation today, Thursday the sixteenth, at six o'clock in the evening. Would you like to cancel this appointment?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, six o'clock today? Yes, that’s the one. I’m so sorry, but I have an urgent matter to attend to, so I definitely can't make it this evening. Is it possible to move it to sometime next week instead?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text:
I understand. I can certainly help you look for a new time with Dr. Anil Mandhani next week.

I have several slots available on Monday, the twentieth of July. Would any of these work for you: nine thirty in the morning, ten thirty in the morning, or five o'clock in the evening?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, the morning slots would be much better for me. Let's go with the ten thirty one, if that's still free?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: That is confirmed, Mr. Krishnan. Your appointment with Dr. Anil Mandhani has been moved to Monday, the twentieth of July, at ten thirty in the morning. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: No, that’s everything, thank you so much for your help. Have a good day.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: You're very welcome. I'm glad we could get that sorted for you. Have a wonderful day, and we look forward to seeing you on Monday. Goodbye.

result.note: multiple matches — ask the caller to choose
